site.title: Réka Mészáros-Erdei | IT Business Consultant
site.description: IT Business Consultant and Digital Transformation Specialist with expertise in IT strategy, process optimization, and product ownership across energy, healthcare, and IT services.
hero.name: Réka Mészáros-Erdei
heroSubtitle: IT Business Consultant & Digital Transformation Specialist — bridging business and technology to drive digital transformation.
profile.title: Profile
profile.text: With a strong foundation in chemical and process engineering, I have developed advanced analytical and problem-solving skills. Over the years, I have gained experience in business analysis, IT strategy, and digital transformation, working across energy, healthcare, and IT services. I thrive in agile environments, collaborating closely with business stakeholders to align IT solutions with strategic goals. My focus is on requirement gathering, backlog management, and process optimization to drive digital adoption and efficiency.
skills.analysis.desc: Requirement gathering, stakeholder interviews, GAP analysis, functional specifications, and user stories.
skills.digital.desc: IT strategy, digital roadmaps, process optimization, and driving technology adoption.
skills.agile.desc: Backlog management, sprint planning, release coordination, and cross-functional collaboration.

about.title: About Me
about.tagline: Get to know me beyond the CV.
about.intro.title: Nice to Meet You
about.intro.text: I'm Réka — a Business Analyst with a passion for turning complex challenges into elegant solutions. My engineering background gave me the analytical mindset, but it's my curiosity and love for continuous learning that keeps me growing every day.
about.background.title: Background
about.skills.title: Skills
about.education.title: Education
about.personal.title: Beyond Work
about.personal.intro: When I'm not optimizing processes or writing user stories, you'll find me outdoors pushing my limits. I believe that the discipline, focus, and teamwork I practice in sports directly translate to how I approach my work.
about.hobbies.title: What Keeps Me Moving
about.hobbies.winter.desc: Snowboarding and skiing in the mountains — there's nothing like the freedom of carving through fresh powder.
about.hobbies.climb.desc: Whether it's indoor bouldering or outdoor rock climbing, I love the problem-solving aspect of finding the perfect route.
about.hobbies.board.desc: My favorite way to clear my head and enjoy the city streets on wheels.
about.hobbies.fitness.desc: Regular gym sessions and bike rides keep me energized and ready for new challenges.
about.travel.title: Exploring the World
about.travel.text: I'm passionate about traveling and discovering new cultures. Learning languages opens doors to deeper connections — that's why I speak Hungarian, English, and German. Every trip teaches me something new about adaptability and perspective.
about.values.title: What Drives Me
about.values.text: The same dedication I bring to conquering a climbing route or navigating a challenging ski slope is what I bring to every project. I believe in persistence, teamwork, and finding creative solutions — whether I'm on a mountain or in a meeting room.
